summary:
Implemented the next high-value task: strengthened the browser smoke audit.

Changed [Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/tools/audit/Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1:85) so each checked page now:
- opens Search and verifies `fuse` returns results
- opens More and verifies menu links render
- clicks a sample in-page section link and verifies the hash changes

Also updated [AGENT_STATE.md](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/AGENT_STATE.md:11), [AGENT_BACKLOG.md](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/AGENT_BACKLOG.md:8), and [SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md:15).

Verification passed:
`powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\tools\audit\Invoke-SiteAudit.ps1 -Tag audit-v240 -SkipScreenshots`

I skipped screenshots because this changed audit tooling, not site UI. The next best task remains fuse-source validation, but that should wait for reliable source material before changing any fuse facts.
